claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Specialty breakdown enriches the Tier 2 placement context A1 partially captured.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the count/states quote but skipped the adjacent specialty-distribution sentence.

claims.limitations: Navigation-level mention only; no program names, eligibility, or sponsorship details on this page.

claims.quote: The Department of Medicine's ACGME-accredited Transitional Year Residency prepares PGY-1 physicians for advanced specialty training through a customizable clinical curriculum at Keck Hospital of USC and USC Arcadia Hospital.
claims.claimText: ACGME-accredited Transitional Year Residency (PGY-1) at Keck Hospital of USC and USC Arcadia Hospital.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 emitted only Emergency Medicine residency as a specific Tier 2 program; missed the Transitional Year Residency which is a key IMG pathway.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Specific residency program detail.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: The Department of Surgery has some of the best and largest residency programs in the country with five accredited ACGME training programs and nine outstanding fellowships.
claims.claimText: USC Department of Surgery has 5 ACGME-accredited residency programs and 9 fellowships.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 captured the overall 60+ programs figure but did not extract the department-specific program counts for Surgery.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Department-level GME program counts.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: The fellowship is available to orthopaedic, plastic, or general surgeons eligible for board certification, requiring a valid California medical license.
claims.claimText: Joseph H. Boyes Hand Fellowship open to orthopaedic, plastic, or general surgeons eligible for board certification; requires valid California medical license.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not extract eligibility/licensure requirements for the Hand Fellowship.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship eligibility requirement.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: This non-ACGME accredited fellowship is open to physicians who have completed an anesthesiology residency.
claims.claimText: Neuroanesthesiology Fellowship is non-ACGME accredited and open to physicians who have completed an anesthesiology residency.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 missed accreditation-status and eligibility note for the Neuroanesthesiology Fellowship.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship accreditation/eligibility detail.
claims.visibilityRationale: source family FELLOWSHIP_PAGE is future-lane only

claims.quote: Successful applicants must meet specific postgraduate training requirements to obtain a California Medical License.
claims.claimText: Society of Urologic Oncology Fellowship: applicants must meet postgraduate training requirements to obtain a California Medical License.
claims.whyA1Missed: A1 did not capture the licensure prerequisite for this fellowship.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: Fellowship licensure eligibility.
claims.limitations: Quote does not name the program directly; context required.

claims.quote: Continuing Medical Education
claims.claimText: Keck School lists a Continuing Medical Education program among its education offerings.
claims.tierAssignmentRationale: CME targets practicing physicians (post-training), placing it in Tier 3 practice/career.

claims.limitations: Index-only label; no CME course list, fees, or eligibility on this page.
